message.content:
```json
{
    "module_name": "main.py",
    "module_purpose": "Main entry point orchestrating the entire pipeline. Loads config, processes video frames, runs both branches, performs fusion, and collects results.",
    "dependencies": [
        "config (local)",
        "data_loader (local)",
        "optical_flow.flow_estimator (local)",
        "feature_matching.matching_pipeline (local)",
        "fusion.bayesian_fusion (local)",
        "fusion.image_quality (local)",
        "utils.calibration (local)",
        "utils.metrics (local)",
        "numpy",
        "torch",
        "cv2 (opencv)",
        "tqdm",
        "os",
        "yaml"
    ],
    "functionality": [
        {
            "name": "load_configuration",
            "purpose": "Load all hyperparameters, paths, and settings from config.yaml and config.py",
            "steps": [
                "Read config.yaml file using PyYAML",
                "Parse dataset settings (resolution, frame_rate, illumination, speeds)",
                "Parse training settings (learning_rate, batch_size, epochs, loss weights)",
                "Parse model settings (optical_flow, feature_matching parameters)",
                "Parse fusion settings (weight_a, weight_b)",
                "Parse evaluation settings (metrics, baselines)",
                "Parse paths (data_dir, video_dir, output_dir, etc.)"
            ]
        },
        {
            "name": "initialize_calibration",
            "purpose": "Load or create camera calibration for pixel-to-world conversion",
            "steps": [
                "Check if calibration file exists at paths.calibration_file",
                "If exists: Load existing calibration matrix from YAML",
                "If not exists: Create default calibration with estimated pixels_per_meter",
                "Store calibration object for use by both branches"
            ]
        },
        {
            "name": "initialize_components",
            "purpose": "Set up all processing components for the pipeline",
            "steps": [
                "Initialize optical_flow.FlowEstimator with model config",
                "Initialize feature_matching.FeatureMatcher with matching config",
                "Initialize fusion.BayesianFusion with fusion config",
                "Initialize utils.metrics.EvaluationMetrics with evaluation config"
            ]
        },
        {
            "name": "process_video_frames",
            "purpose": "Process video data through both branches and fusion",
            "steps": [
                "Get list of video files from paths.video_dir",
                "For each video file:",
                "  - Read video using data_loader.VideoDataLoader",
                "  - Extract frame pairs (consecutive frames)",
                "  - For each frame pair:",
                "    - Call process_frame_pair() to get fused speed",
                "    - Store result with ground truth for evaluation"
            ]
        },
        {
            "name": "process_frame_pair",
            "purpose": "Execute complete processing pipeline for a single frame pair",
            "inputs": "frame1 (ndarray), frame2 (ndarray), ground_truth_speed (float)",
            "outputs": "FusionResult with fused_speed, weight_optical, weight_feature",
            "steps": [
                "Step 1: Optical Flow Branch",
                "  - Call flow_estimator.estimate(frame1, frame2)",
                "  - Receive OpticalFlowResult with flow_field and speed_px_per_sec",
                "  - Convert pixel speed to m/s using calibration.pixels_per_meter",
                "  - Store V_optical (speed in m/s)",
                "",
                "Step 2: Feature Matching Branch",
                "  - Call feature_matcher.process(frame1, frame2)",
                "  - Receive FeatureMatchResult with matches and inliers",
                "  - Convert pixel displacement to m/s using calibration",
                "  - Store V_feature (speed in m/s)",
                "",
                "Step 3: Image Quality Assessment",
                "  - Call image_quality.assess(frame1)",
                "  - Calculate brightness (L): mean pixel intensity",
                "  - Calculate contrast (C): standard deviation of pixel intensity",
                "",
                "Step 4: Bayesian Weight Calculation",
                "  - Call bayesian_fusion.calculate_weights(brightness, contrast)",
                "  - Compute raw weights: w_optical_raw = a*L + b*C, w_feature_raw = a*L + b*C",
                "  - Normalize: w_optical = w_optical_raw / (w_optical_raw + w_feature_raw)",
                "  - Normalize: w_feature = w_feature_raw / (w_optical_raw + w_feature_raw)",
                "",
                "Step 5: Decision Fusion",
                "  - Compute V_fusion = w_optical * V_optical + w_feature * V_feature",
                "  - Return FusionResult with fused_speed and weights"
            ]
        },
        {
            "name": "run_baseline_comparison",
            "purpose": "Compare proposed method against baseline algorithms",
            "steps": [
                "For optical flow baselines (TV-L1, FlowNet2, RAFT):",
                "  - Run each baseline on same test data",
                "  - Collect speed estimates",
                "  - Compute MAE, RMSE, error_percentage",
                "",
                "For feature matching baselines (SIFT, FAST, ORB):",
                "  - Run each baseline on same test data",
                "  - Collect speed estimates",
                "  - Compute MAE, RMSE, error_percentage",
                "",
                "Store all comparison results for reporting"
            ]
        },
        {
            "name": "evaluate_results",
            "purpose": "Calculate evaluation metrics and generate comparison tables",
            "steps": [
                "Collect all processed results with ground truth",
                "For proposed method:",
                "  - Compute MAE using metrics.calculate_mae(estimates, ground_truths)",
                "  - Compute RMSE using metrics.calculate_rmse(estimates, ground_truths)",
                "  - Compute error_percentage for each sample",
                "",
                "For each baseline method:",
                "  - Compute same metrics",
                "",
                "Generate comparison tables (like Table I, II, III in paper)",
                "Create visualization charts (like Figure 10, 12, 13 in paper)"
            ]
        },
        {
            "name": "save_results",
            "purpose": "Save evaluation results and visualizations to output directory",
            "steps": [
                "Create output directory if not exists (paths.output_dir)",
                "Save metrics summary to CSV/JSON",
                "Save comparison tables to files",
                "Save generated plots/figures as PNG"
            ]
        }
    ],
    "control_flow": {
        "phase_1_initialization": [
            "1. Import all required modules",
            "2. Load configuration from config.yaml",
            "3. Initialize camera calibration",
            "4. Initialize optical flow estimator (load RAFT-SEnet model)",
            "5. Initialize feature matching pipeline",
            "6. Initialize Bayesian fusion module",
            "7. Initialize metrics calculator"
        ],
        "phase_2_main_processing": [
            "8. Get list of video files from data directory",
            "9. Iterate through each video with progress bar (tqdm)",
            "10. For each video: Load frames using data_loader",
            "11. Create frame pairs (frame[i], frame[i+1]) for i in range(n-1)",
            "12. For each frame pair:",
            "    12a. Run optical flow estimation -> V_optical",
            "    12b. Run feature matching -> V_feature",
            "    12c. Assess image quality -> brightness, contrast",
            "    12d. Calculate Bayesian weights",
            "    12e. Fuse results -> V_fusion",
            "    12f. Store result with ground truth",
            "13. Aggregate results across all videos"
        ],
        "phase_3_baseline_comparison": [
            "14. Run baseline optical flow methods (TV-L1, FlowNet2, RAFT)",
            "15. Run baseline feature matching methods (SIFT, FAST, ORB)",
            "16. Collect all baseline results"
        ],
        "phase_4_evaluation": [
            "17. Calculate MAE, RMSE, error_percentage for each method",
            "18. Generate comparison tables",
            "19. Create visualization charts",
            "20. Save all results to output directory"
        ]
    },
    "error_handling": [
        {
            "scenario": "Video file not found",
            "handling": "Log warning, skip to next video, continue processing"
        },
        {
            "scenario": "Frame loading failure",
            "handling": "Log error, skip frame pair, continue with next"
        },
        {
            "scenario": "Optical flow model inference failure",
            "handling": "Log error, set V_optical to None, rely on feature matching"
        },
        {
            "scenario": "No feature matches found",
            "handling": "Log warning, set V_feature to None, rely on optical flow"
        },
        {
            "scenario": "Calibration file missing",
            "handling": "Use default calibration, warn user about accuracy"
        },
        {
            "scenario": "GPU not available for torch",
            "handling": "Fallback to CPU processing, log warning"
        }
    ],
    "data_flow": {
        "input": [
            "Video files from paths.video_dir",
            "Ground truth speeds (from filename or separate annotation file)",
            "Calibration file from paths.calibration_file"
        ],
        "processing_stages": [
            "Video -> Frames (data_loader)",
            "Frames -> Frame Pairs (main.py)",
            "Frame Pair + Optical Flow Model -> OpticalFlowResult",
            "Frame Pair + Feature Matcher -> FeatureMatchResult",
            "Frame Pair -> Quality Assessment -> (brightness, contrast)",
            "OpticalFlowResult + FeatureMatchResult + Quality -> FusionResult"
        ],
        "output": [
            "Fused speed estimates (m/s)",
            "Individual branch speeds (V_optical, V_feature)",
            "Bayesian weights (w_optical, w_feature)",
            "Evaluation metrics (MAE, RMSE, error%)",
            "Comparison tables and figures"
        ]
    },
    "key_algorithms": {
        "optical_flow_estimation": {
            "model": "RAFT-SEnet",
            "input": "Two consecutive RGB frames",
            "output": "Dense optical flow field (H x W x 2)",
            "speed_conversion": "avg_flow_magnitude * pixels_per_meter * frame_rate"
        },
        "feature_matching": {
            "pipeline": "Harris -> BRIEF -> RANSAC",
            "input": "Two consecutive BGR frames",
            "output": "Inlier matched feature point pairs",
            "speed_conversion": "avg_displacement * pixels_per_meter * frame_rate"
        },
        "bayesian_fusion": {
            "weight_calculation": "w = a*L + b*C, then normalize",
            "fusion_formula": "V_fusion = w_optical * V_optical + w_feature * V_feature"
        }
    },
    "config_dependencies": {
        "from_dataset": "resolution, frame_rate for speed conversion",
        "from_training": "Not used in inference mode (main.py)",
        "from_model": "input_height, input_width for frame preprocessing",
        "from_model.optical_flow": "use_senet flag for model selection",
        "from_model.feature_matching": "harris params, ransac params for matching",
        "from_fusion": "weight_a, weight_b for Bayesian calculation",
        "from_paths": "data_dir, video_dir, output_dir for file I/O"
    },
    "notes": [
        "Ground truth speed can be extracted from video filename (e.g., 'belt_1.5ms.mp4') or from separate annotation file",
        "ROI (Region of Interest) should be defined to focus on conveyor belt area, not full frame",
        "Frame preprocessing: resize to model input size, normalize to [0,1] or [-1,1]",
        "For BGR->RGB conversion when passing frames to optical flow model (PyTorch expects RGB)",
        "OpenCV uses BGR format, PyTorch/TorchVision uses RGB format",
        "Speed conversion formula: speed_mps = pixel_displacement * pixels_per_meter * frame_rate",
        "For optical flow: avg_magnitude = mean(flow[:,:,0]^2 + flow[:,:,1]^2)^0.5",
        "For feature matching: avg_displacement = mean(distance(matched_points))",
        "If V_optical or V_feature is None/unavailable, use the other as fallback with weight=1.0"
    ]
}
```
